hero.title: Use AI for the work you already do
hero.subtitle: Most AI education teaches how AI works. Maddy the Techie shows you how to work with AI

problem.title: AI should feel useful, not overwhelming
problem.subtitle: You don't have a technical problem. You have a starting-point problem. Once you know the right tools and the right order, everything clicks.
problem.hint: You don't need to become a developer
problem.hintHighlight: You just need the right system
problem.item0desc: You copy the same data, send the same emails, and follow the same steps every day. It works, but it takes hours you don't have.
problem.item1desc: Every week there's a new AI tool, a new trend, a new thing to learn. It's hard to know where to start or what actually matters for your work.
problem.item2title: Using AI like a search bar
problem.item2desc: You use ChatGPT or Claude, but only for basic questions. You know there's more it can do, you just haven't figured out how yet.
problem.item3desc: AI is changing how people work, fast. You want to stay confident, relevant, and ahead, without needing a tech degree to do it.

method.title: Simple tools
method.subtitle: Most people try to use AI and automation separately. The real power is combining them into a single, connected workflow
method.part1desc: Automation handles the repetitive work, including copy-paste, data entry, follow-up emails, and scheduling. Set it up once, and it runs by itself every time.
method.part1item0: Triggers, actions, and logic with no code
method.part1item3: Works while you focus on real work
method.part2desc: AI handles the thinking work, including writing, summarising, analysing, and planning. It drafts emails, summarises reports, and suggests next steps based on your instructions.
method.part2item1: AI agents that work across multiple steps
method.part2item3: Safe, honest, and useful. Not just hype.
method.quote: "Automation handles the repetitive work. AI helps with the thinking work.
method.quoteHighlight: Together, they change how you work."

curriculum.title: Learn by building real workflows
curriculum.subtitle: Four structured parts that take you from "I don't know where to start" to building workflows you actually use every day
curriculum.bottomNote: Every part ends with something you can use immediately in your work.
curriculum.bottomNoteHighlight: No fluff, no theory for its own sake
curriculum.part0tagline: Understand how automation works and build your first real workflow
curriculum.part0item0: What automation is and when to use it
curriculum.part0item2: APIs and webhooks explained in plain English
curriculum.part0item3: Planning your first workflow step by step
curriculum.part1tagline: Use AI for real work tasks, emails, reports, research, and planning
curriculum.part1item0: AI for emails, reports, notes, research, and planning
curriculum.part1item1: Prompting strategies for practical work tasks
curriculum.part1item3: When to use AI and when not to
curriculum.part2tagline: Go beyond basic chatting and build AI that actually does work for you
curriculum.part2item0: The difference between an assistant and an agent
curriculum.part3tagline: Build four complete real-world workflows from start to finish

projects.title: Real workflows you can
projects.subtitle: Every module ends with a project you take with you, practical from the first day
projects.proj0desc: Write and reply to emails faster using simple prompts in ChatGPT or Claude. Draft replies, adjust your tone, and clear your inbox in minutes
projects.proj1desc: Plan a full month of content inside Google Sheets with AI-suggested topics, post formats, and captions for your audience
projects.proj2desc: Paste your weekly notes or data and get a clean written summary in seconds, no editing or formatting needed
projects.proj3desc: Save and organize your best prompts by task in Google Sheets so you can reuse what works without starting over every time
projects.proj4desc: Track clients and leads in a clean Google Sheets system with status columns, follow-up notes, and simple filters

whoItsFor.title: For professionals ready to work smarter
whoItsFor.subtitle: This training was built for people who work hard and want to work smarter, not for engineers or data scientists
whoItsFor.noRequirementsTitle: You do not need any of these to start
whoItsFor.noRequirementsSubtitle: If you use a computer for work, you have everything you need
whoItsFor.aud0desc: Admin, marketing, operations, HR, project coordinators, remote workers, and knowledge workers who want practical AI skills without needing to code.
whoItsFor.aud1desc: YouTube creators, newsletter writers, and digital product sellers who want faster, smarter content workflows without spending all day on production.
whoItsFor.aud2desc: Owners who need simple, reliable systems for leads, follow-ups, bookings, customer replies, content, and reports, without hiring a developer.

resources.title: Templates that help you start faster
resources.subtitle: Start with simple prompts, checklists, and guides you can use right away
resources.starterDesc: New templates, checklists, and guides added regularly. Join the waitlist to be the first to know
resources.res0desc: A simple starter pack with prompts, tool recommendations, and a step-by-step checklist for using AI at work
resources.res1desc: Ready-to-use prompts for emails, reports, meeting summaries, content ideas, and more. Copy, paste, and customise.
resources.res2desc: Pre-built workflow blueprints for common automation setups. Import into Make or Zapier and customise for your needs.
resources.res3desc: Simple checklists to help you plan, test, and launch your first automations without skipping important steps
resources.res4desc: Short, focused guides on ChatGPT, Claude, Google Sheets, writing effective prompts, and more
resources.res5desc: A plain-English breakdown of the top AI tools, covering what each does, when to use it, and which ones are worth your time

services.title: Get help building your AI workflow
services.subtitle: Need help turning ideas into a simple system? Start with a focused setup using ChatGPT, Claude, and Google Sheets
services.svc0desc: Find what tasks can be simplified with AI
services.svc1desc: Create reusable prompts for emails, reports, content, and research
services.svc2desc: Build simple trackers, planners, and workflow systems

about.title: AI education
about.desc1: Maddy the Techie helps professionals, creators, and small business owners use AI with more clarity and confidence
about.desc2: The focus is simple: learn how to use ChatGPT, Claude, and Google Sheets to organize ideas, create better workflows, save time, and turn everyday work into simple systems
about.subtitle: AI & Automation Educator
about.tagline: "Making AI practical for everyone who doesn't code."
about.belief0: You do not need to understand every technical detail behind AI
about.belief1: You need practical ways to use it in your work, and that is what Maddy the Techie is built for

cta.title: Turn AI into
cta.titleHighlight: a simple system for your work
cta.subtitle: Start with a template, learn the basics, or get help building your first workflow

footer.disclaimer: Educational guidance only, not professional advice
